title: Cladding remediation unit costs 2025: analysis of non-ACM buildings
body: "This publication provides data on unit costs, defined as cost per square metre (m2) of cladding remediated, for high-rise (18m+) and mid-rise (11-18m) non-ACM buildings. It provides information on the mean unit cost, analysis against cladding m2 area remediated, and an elemental unit cost breakdown into key cost categories.  This is an ad-hoc release of management information and does not constitute an Official Statistics or National Statistics release. "
